description: OPPO F1s A1601 firmware assets to reacquire after local firmware loss. Large binaries remain ignored by Git.

items.title: A1601EX_11_A.41_191226 RepairMyMobile OFP service package
notes: MediaFire browser page was previously usable manually, but automated transfers stalled or reset.
Expected extracted OFP: firmware\stock\A1601EX_11_A.41_191226_RepairMyMobile\A1601EX_11_A.41_191226_RMM\oppo6750_15331.ofp
Expected AP DB: A1601EX_11_A.41_191226_database_AP
Expected MD DB: A1601EX_11_A.41_191226_database
Do not use DownloadTool.exe for this workflow.

items.title: Oppo_F1S_A1601_MT6750_EX_11_A.24_161119 scatter firmware
notes: AddROM Google Drive mirror validated on 2026-06-24: scatter, AP/MD databases, nonzero system.img, and no zero-byte IMG/BIN entries.
Expected scatter after extraction: firmware\stock\A1601EX_11_A24_161119\Firmware\MT6750_Android_scatter.txt
This package later hit secure-boot md1img verified-image limitations, but it is still worth preserving for comparison.

items.title: A1601EX_11_A.40_190709 AddROM OFP service package
notes: Direct download URL was not preserved in the repo; docs identify it as an AddROM/Google Drive package.
Expected OFP SHA-256 after extraction: FBD3CC8EBB421ADFA0D9C7D20E3BB6B6ABA03D9C64112DA79AA2143C4BF75DAC
Expected files: oppo6750_15331.ofp, A1601EX_11_A.40_190709_database, A1601EX_11_A.40_190709_database_AP.
Reject DownloadTool.exe usage; use OFP extraction or validated scatter output only.

items.title: Official OPPO A1601EX_11_A.41_191226 recovery OTA
notes: Stock recovery OTA, not SP Flash scatter firmware.
Metadata recorded: version_name=A1601EX_11_A.41_191226, pre-device=A1601, wipe=0.

items.title: Official OPPO A1601EX_11_A.40_190709 recovery OTA
notes: Stock recovery OTA, not SP Flash scatter firmware.
The phone previously rejected it because installed OS version compared newer.

items.title: Official OPPO A1601EX_11_D.01_170328 wipe recovery OTA
notes: Stock recovery OTA, not SP Flash scatter firmware.
This package wipes user data: wipe=1, wipe-data=1.

items.title: Oppo_F1S_A1601_MT6750_EX_11_A.15_160913 scatter firmware
notes: AddROM Google Drive mirror validated on 2026-06-24: scatter, AP/MD databases, nonzero system.img, and no zero-byte IMG/BIN entries.
The previous lost extracted copy had a zero-byte system.img; this reacquired archive does not.

items.title: A1601EX_11_A.41_191226 tar.bz2 candidate
notes: Downloaded and archive-tested on 2026-06-24.
Contains oppo6750_15331.ofp and matching A1601EX_11_A.41_191226 AP/MD database files.
Contains DownloadTool.exe; keep only as an OFP extraction/reference package and do not execute DownloadTool.

items.title: Official OPPO A1601EX_11_OTA_002_all_201704120142 wipe recovery OTA
notes: Historical OPPO S3 URL surfaced in deep research.
Stock recovery OTA, not SP Flash scatter firmware.
Expected to wipe data.

items.title: A1601EX_11_A.42_210906 HalabTech ZIP candidate
notes: Deep research identified this as the latest named A1601EX branch.
Manual because HalabTech/GBFirmware-style download pages may require login, rate limiting, or browser flow.
GBFirmware public metadata confirmed file id 13935, slug a1601ex-11-42-210906, size 1750199173, and price null; download component uses authenticated API route.
HalabTech/GiveMeROM/GSM-style direct download endpoints redirect to downloads page without a session; Filewale requires sign-in.
Validate for scatter/OFP, AP/MD databases, auth/custom-bin artifacts, and verified/signed image coverage before any use.

items.title: A1601EX_11_A.41_191226 GSM-Firmware RAR candidate
notes: Deep research identified this as a full/service A41 package in a different container from the local tar.bz2 and RMM ZIP.
Manual because the GSM-Firmware page redirects/protects direct download without an authorized session.
Useful comparison target for OFP contents and possible verified/signed image differences.

items.title: Oppo_F1S_A1601 A.16 AndroidFileHost scatter/full firmware candidate
notes: Deep research identified this AndroidFileHost mirror with a published MD5.
Mirror header on 2026-06-26 reported Content-Length 1614050748.
Downloader resolves AndroidFileHost mirrors through the public mirror endpoint.
Treat as medium-risk mirror and validate before use.

items.title: OPPO A1601EX No Auth Firmware listing
notes: Research-only listing, not a trusted OPPO auth source.
Do not promote into active flashing unless extracted and independently validated.
Do not use to bypass OPPO/MediaTek authentication.

items.title: NeedROM Oppo F1S A1601EX Official Firmware lead
notes: Login-gated user-uploaded source lead from deep research.
Instructions reference MT6750_Android_scatter.txt.
Treat as documentation/source lead unless an archive is manually obtained and validated.

items.title: NeedROM PRELOADER AUTH DA FILE (BFT) generic auth/DA bundle
notes: Research-only generic auth/DA bundle, not A1601-specific.
Deep research says it lists Auth_sv5.auth, New_sv5.auth, several DAs, and many OPPO models.
Manually copied from C:\Users\GDJ\Downloads on 2026-07-01.
Archive listing contains 3525 entries, including generic DA/auth files, OPPO/MT6750-looking preloaders, and a BYPASS folder.
Keep quarantined; do not wire this archive into automatic flasher/auth selection.
Do not use as trusted device auth.

items.title: Filewale A1601 tested custom.bin research lead
notes: Tiny third-party custom.bin lead from deep research.
Research-only unless manually obtained and inspected.
Not an OPPO source.

items.title: GSM Tested File OPPO F1 PLUS A1601 CM2 MT2 boot helper lead
notes: High mislabel risk: source says F1 PLUS while A1601 is F1s.
Research-only boot/helper lead.
Do not flash blind.
